ddls:
CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "unique_key" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the complaint */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the complaint was created */,
  "closed_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the complaint was closed */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Identifier for the agency responsible for the complaint */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agency */,
  "complaint_type" TEXT /* Type of complaint (e.g., Dirty Conditions) */,
  "descriptor" TEXT /* Detailed descriptor of the complaint */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Sidewalk, Street) */,
  "incident_zip" TEXT /* ZIP code where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_address" TEXT /* Address where the incident occurred */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street related to the incident */,
  "cross_street1" TEXT /* First cross street near the incident */,
  "cross_street2" TEXT /* Second cross street near the incident */,
  "intersection_street1" TEXT /* First intersection street related to the incident */,
  "intersection_street2" TEXT /* Second intersection street related to the incident */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., ADDRESS, INTERSECTION) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "landmark" TEXT /* Landmark associated with the incident */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint (e.g., Closed, Open) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for resolution of the complaint */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of how the complaint was resolved */,
  "resolution_action_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the resolution action was updated */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resident who submitted the complaint */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Name of the resident who submitted the complaint */,
  "reporter_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the resident who submitted the complaint */,
  "reporter_email" TEXT /* Email address of the resident who submitted the complaint */,
  "complaint_category" TEXT /* Category of the complaint (e.g., Sanitation, Transportation) */,
  "complaint_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the complaint (e.g., Illegal Dumping, Pothole) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unique_key"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_agency FOREIGN KEY ("agency") REFERENCES agencies ("agency"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_incident_zip FOREIGN KEY ("incident_zip") REFERENCES locations ("incident_zip"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_complaint_type FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_type") REFERENCES complaint_types ("complaint_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency" TEXT /* Identifier for the agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., City, State) */,
  "agency_department" TEXT /* Department within the agency (e.g., Sanitation, Transportation) */,
  "agency_contact" TEXT /* Contact person within the agency */,
  "agency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency */,
  "agency_email" TEXT /* Email address of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_types" (
  "complaint_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint type */,
  "complaint_type" TEXT /* Type of complaint (e.g., Dirty Conditions) */,
  "descriptor" TEXT /* Detailed descriptor of the complaint type */,
  "complaint_category" TEXT /* Category of the complaint (e.g., Sanitation, Transportation) */,
  "complaint_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the complaint (e.g., Illegal Dumping, Pothole) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "incident_zip" TEXT /* ZIP code where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_address" TEXT /* Address where the incident occurred */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "landmark" TEXT /* Landmark associated with the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Sidewalk, Street) */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the location is situated */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_updates" (
  "status_update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "unique_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint that was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_updates_unique_key FOREIGN KEY ("unique_key") REFERENCES complaints ("unique_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the resident */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the resident */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the resident */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the resident */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the resident is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the resident is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code where the resident is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "unique_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint that the comment is associated with */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_comments_unique_key FOREIGN KEY ("unique_key") REFERENCES complaints ("unique_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "unique_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint that the attachment is associated with */,
  "attachment_type" TEXT /* Type of attachment (e.g., image, video) */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL of the attachment */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_attachments_unique_key FOREIGN KEY ("unique_key") REFERENCES complaints ("unique_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "unique_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint that the historical entry is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint (e.g., Resolved, Closed) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was resolved or closed */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of how the complaint was resolved or closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_history_unique_key FOREIGN KEY ("unique_key") REFERENCES complaints ("unique_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Identifier for the agency that the performance entry is associated with */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time for the agency */,
  "resolution_rate" REAL /* Resolution rate for the agency */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_performance_agency FOREIGN KEY ("agency") REFERENCES agencies ("agency")
)
